description:
You are a Network and Computer Systems Administrator who needs to log a recently renewed annual maintenance contract in ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus. Create and save a new contract with the following details:

- Contract Name: Cisco SmartNet Support - Core Switches FY2025
- Vendor Name: Cisco Systems
- Contract Number: CSC-2025-AMC-00471
- Support Type: 24x7
- Start Date: January 15, 2025
- Expiry Date: January 14, 2026
- Cost: 24750
- Description: Annual maintenance and technical support contract covering all Cisco Catalyst 9300 series switches deployed across the main campus network. Includes 24x7 TAC access with 4-hour hardware replacement SLA. Contract managed by Network Operations team.

Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.

metadata.contract_name: Cisco SmartNet Support - Core Switches FY2025
metadata.expected_description_snippet: Annual maintenance and technical support contract covering all Cisco Catalyst 9300
